blocker.title: Demo personas and seed data incomplete
blocker.summary: Resolved: `npm run seed` upserts demo fixtures by default; use `npm run seed:baseline` or `SEED_SKIP_DEMO=true` to skip. Use admin toolbar **Demo data** toggle + `?demo=1` for marketing tours. Ongoing QA: verify Stripe test objects and copy after schema changes.

blocker.title: AI ops assistant tour not scheduled
blocker.summary: Staff “AI beta” Joyride step is deferred until phase `08` assistant UI is stable enough to anchor `data-tour` targets. Portal and marketing tours (`06-10` / `06-11` scope) intentionally exclude AI; see `.planning/workflows/ai-ops-assistant-beta.md`.
